text.title: inc-read-only-investigation-default Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for inc-read-only-investigation-default as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Granting patch on * because it "feels safe enough".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Resource scope matters as much as verb scope. patch deployments/* includes editing image references — full code-execution path under a benign-sounding verb.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Trust is a property of the moment, not the service. The same agent during a calm afternoon and during a 3 a.m. confused incident are equally privileged — that is the leak.
